returnShape.present: present({ nativeResult, context, ambiguity?, source? }) calls popup.open(preview)

create no UI before present(input) is called
validate nativeResult and context without extracting or reading a PDF
build one preview envelope preserving nativeResult and context references
default ambiguity and source to empty objects when omitted
call popup.open(preview) exactly once per successful present call
allow repeated present calls to update the existing open popup through the popup lifecycle
delegate close and dispose directly to the existing popup
allow persistence only when the existing popup receives Aceptar
allow zero persistence when the existing popup receives Editar

present preserves nativeResult and context references

present forwards explicit ambiguity and source
present mounts exactly one popup root
present renders the eight canonical fields through the existing popup
repeated present updates pending preview without a second popup root

close delegates and clears the popup
no PDF read, extraction, OCR, file access, route, dashboard, selector discovery, localStorage, or backend creation is introduced

the UI surface binding, UI wiring, persistence adapter, coordinator, contract, or store

reading PDF files or filesystem paths
automatic discovery of a PDF flow owner

promotion of PDF extraction to official quote truth
